title: neuropeltis maingayi var. tomentosa
intro: Neuropeltis maingayi var. tomentosa, commonly known as the hairy neuropeltis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Neuropeltis maingayi var. tomentosa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
